items.title_en: Where you want to invest in tech for the second half, according to one top analyst
items.title_zh: 一位顶级分析师表示，下半年你想投资科技领域
items.desc_en: Frontier models need access to increasing volumes of maneuverable data. Software companies that can supply it will be crucial in the entire ecosystem.
items.desc_zh: 前沿模型需要访问越来越多的可操作数据。能够提供它的软件公司将在整个生态系统中至关重要。

items.title_en: Social Security gender gap means women receive about $4,800 less in annual benefits. What to know before claiming
items.title_zh: 社会保障性别差距意味着女性每年领取的福利少约 4,800 美元。索赔前需要了解什么
items.desc_en: Women tend to earn less and spend more time outside of the work force, which may reduce their Social Security benefits. Here's what to consider before claiming.
items.desc_zh: 女性的收入往往较低，并且在工作之外的时间较多，这可能会减少她们的社会保障福利。以下是索赔之前需要考虑的事项。

items.title_en: Where to find top CD yields in the second half as Fed policy remains murky
items.title_zh: 由于美联储政策仍不明朗，下半年哪里可以找到最高的 CD 收益率
items.desc_en: Banks are fine-tuning their approach toward deposits, with some trimming rates on high-yield savings accounts while others lift rates on CDs.
items.desc_zh: 银行正在微调其存款方式，一些银行下调了高收益储蓄账户的利率，而另一些银行则提高了存款证的利率。

items.title_en: Firefighters struggle to contain deadly Greek wildfire

items.desc_zh: 超过 100 名消防员正在努力扑灭塞萨洛尼基附近的一场大火，这场大火已造成人员伤亡。

items.title_en: What are US and Japanese soldiers doing in the middle of the Australian bush?
items.title_zh: 美国和日本士兵在澳大利亚丛林中做什么？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Katy Watson explains why troops are training in remote Australia - a country not at war, thousands of kilometres from today's major conflicts.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的凯蒂·沃森 (Katy Watson) 解释了为什么军队要在偏远的澳大利亚进行训练——这个国家没有处于战争状态，距离今天的重大冲突有数千公里。

items.desc_zh: 来自其他非洲国家的数千人在反移民组织规定的周二最后期限之前离开南非。

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨

items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。
